title: Search and Discovery
description: Process of locating information using search criteria and obtaining details on available products via searchable metadata, browse images, and catalogue services.

definitions.definition: Process of locating information using search criteria and obtaining details on available products via searchable metadata, browse images, and catalogue services.
definitions.notes: Finding Aid: a type of Access Aid that allows a user to search for and identify Archival Information Packages of interest.
definitions.sources:
- [CEOS/WGISS/DSIG/GLOS](https://ceos.org/document_management/Working_Groups/WGISS/Interest_Groups/Data_Stewardship/White_Papers/EO-DataStewardshipGlossary.pdf)

- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
